text: Light blue, high-waisted, straight-legged jeans with a cropped inseam.
Light-blue, distressed mid-rise skinny jeans with holes at the knees.
A pair of mid-rise skinny jeans with a dark wash and a slight stretch. They have a five-pocket design and a zip fly with a button closure. The inseam is 28 inches.
Light blue distressed high-rise skinny jeans with a raw hem.

A pair of mid-rise skinny jeans with a dark blue wash and frayed hem. They are made with a stretch fabric for a comfortable fit and have a classic five-pocket design. The jeans are perfect for everyday wear and can be dressed up or down.
